core.label: Modern Fortran
core.description: Syntax, arrays, and scientific computing fundamentals.

topics.label: Installation & Compilers
topics.description: Install gfortran or Intel Fortran. Modern Fortran (2008/2018) is very different from FORTRAN 77.

topics.label: Variables & Types
topics.description: integer, real, complex, character, logical. implicit none is mandatory in modern Fortran.

topics.label: Arrays
topics.description: Multi-dimensional arrays with powerful slicing, where, and whole-array operations. Fortran's strength.

topics.label: Control Flow
topics.description: if/else if/end if, select case, do loops, do concurrent. do concurrent enables parallelism.

topics.label: Subroutines & Functions
topics.description: subroutine (with intent in/out/inout) and function. Explicit interfaces with interface blocks.

topics.label: Modules
topics.description: Organize code with module/use. Modules provide encapsulation and separate compilation.

topics.label: Derived Types
topics.description: User-defined types (like structs) with components and type-bound procedures.

topics.label: File I/O
topics.description: Read and write formatted/unformatted files with open, read, write, close.

topics.label: fpm (Fortran Package Manager)
topics.description: Build projects and manage dependencies with fpm. Modern Fortran's build tool.

topics.label: Coarrays (Parallelism)
topics.description: Built-in parallel programming with coarrays. Fortran has native parallelism support.
